creator: netsys@fedoraproject.org
text:
I made a spanish dvorak keyboard for FreeBSD. If FreeBSD team sent to me an email about if I was author or not. I could not get it. Because I have an another email address.

So, I see if my keyboard model was added on FreeBSD. I do not see my name, username. Only this:

1	# $FreeBSD$
2 	# alt
3 	# scan cntrl alt alt cntrl lock
4 	# code base shift cntrl shift alt shift cntrl shift state

http://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/release/9.1.0/share/syscons/keymaps/spanish.dvorak.kbd?revision=243808&view=markup

When should show this.

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-bugs/2011-August/045259.html

# Spanish dvorak variant
#
#  Base: Satoshi us.dvorak.kbd
#  Helped with: spanish.iso15.acc.kbd
#  
#  netSys
#
# $FreeBSD: src/share/syscons/keymaps/spanish.dvorak.kbd,v 1.7 2001/03/11 23:41:19 ache Exp $

I hope this fix it. Thanks.

Fix: Edit these lines and add my name for my work.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD 9.1-RELEASE on your PC, or see the /usr/share/syscons/keymaps/spanish.dvorak.kbd.
